sections.heading: How to Play
sections.content: Clash-A-Mana is a real-time card battle game. Deploy cards to the arena using mana, destroy the opponent's tower to win. Each card costs mana — manage your resources wisely.
list: Mana - The energy resource used to deploy cards. Regenerates over time.
Tower - Your base. If destroyed, you lose the match.
Arena - The battlefield split into two lanes.
Cycle - Your deck of 8 cards cycles continuously during battle.

sections.heading: Rarity System
sections.content: Every entity in Clash-A-Mana has a rarity tier that reflects its power, scarcity, and role in the Stagnantia project. Higher rarity cards are harder to obtain but significantly more powerful.
list: Mundane - Common workers and basic constructs. Easy to deploy, reliable.
Familiar - Trained soldiers and tamed beasts. Good synergy potential.
Arcane - Mystic entities infused with portal energy. Unique abilities.
Relic - Ancient warriors of legend. High cost, high impact.
Ascendant - Evolved beings beyond normal classification.
Apex - The pinnacle of combat power. Extremely rare.
Ethereal - Beings that exist between dimensions. Unpredictable and devastating.

sections.heading: Sides
sections.content: Stagnantia is divided into two opposing sides, locked in perpetual conflict for the entertainment of the Crimson Crown. Every card wielder belongs to one side - but the true enemy is the system itself.
list: The Crimson Crown - The ruling elite who architect and profit from the conflict.
The Azure Core - The working class, forced into the arena as entertainment.

sections.heading: Win Conditions
sections.content: Destroy the enemy tower before the timer runs out. If both towers survive, the player who dealt more tower damage wins. In case of a tie, sudden death overtime begins with accelerated mana regeneration.
list: Tower Destruction - Instantly win by destroying the opponent's tower.
Higher Damage - Win on timer if your tower has less damage taken.
Overtime - Sudden death with doubled mana regeneration.
Perfect Victory - Destroy tower without taking any damage yourself.

sections.heading: Card Stats
sections.content: Oyunda bir çox əsas özəllik mövcuddur:
list: Health - The total amount of life your card has. When it reaches zero, your character dies.
Shield - A protective shield that absorbs 70 percent of incoming damage.
Damage - The amount of harm dealt to an enemy per hit or action.
Attack Speed - How fast your card performs attacks within a given time.
Range - The maximum distance from which your card attacks or uses abilities.
Speed - How fast your card moves across the game world.
D.P.S. - Damage per second. The average damage your card deals each second over time.
Critical Damage - The extra damage dealt when a critical hit occurs.
Critical Chance - The percentage chance for an attack to become a critical hit.
Life Steal - A mechanic where a portion of dealt damage restores your health.
Life Steal Chance - The probability that an attack triggers life steal.
Damage Reduction - A stat that lowers incoming damage before it affects health.
Dodge - A chance-based mechanic that avoids incoming attacks completely.

sections.heading: Positive Status Effects
list: Heal: Restores a specific amount of health to an ally card over a set duration.
Untouchable: Grants an ally card complete immunity to all incoming damage for a limited time.
Immortal: Prevents an ally card from dying for a set duration; their health cannot drop below 0.
Predominance: Grants an ally card total immunity to all negative status effects for a limited time.
Fearless: Grants damage reduction to an ally card when no other ally cards are nearby, or when surrounded by more than 5 enemy cards.
Taunt: Forces nearby enemy cards to focus their attacks exclusively on the casting ally card for a set duration.

sections.heading: Negative Status Effects
list: Burn: Deals continuous damage to an enemy card over time and reduces their healing received by 20%.
Poison: Inflicts continuous damage to an enemy card over time and reduces their movement speed by 10%.
Slow: Decreases an enemy card's movement speed and attack speed by a specified percentage (minimum 10%).
Silence: Prevents an enemy card from activating or using any abilities.
Blind: Restricts an enemy card's vision and attack range by a specified percentage (minimum 10%).
Stat Reduction: Lowers the base stats of an enemy card by a specified amount.
Curse: Amplifies the damage an enemy card receives from all sources.
Stun: Immobilizes an enemy card for a set duration, preventing movement and attacks.
